selections.catalyst: USO is the cleanest expression of the Hormuz blockade catalyst. Trump announced a naval blockade of Iranian ports effect
selections.reasoning: USO is the cleanest expression of the Hormuz blockade catalyst. Trump announced a naval blockade of Iranian ports effective today 10AM ET; OPEC output already down 7.88M bbl/day; WTI surging to $104 (+7%). Technical confirmation is unambiguous: RSI 74.5 (momentum, not overbought in a supply shock), MACD histogram strongly positive at +1.09, price above SMA20 ($127.54) and SMA50 ($126.02) by a wide margin, BB %B at 0.921 showing upper-band breakout. Live price $134.05. This is a 3/4 criteria entry: (1) clear hard catalyst — geopolitical supply shock, (2) strong technical confirmation, (3) volume building into open, (4) regime allows energy longs. VIX at 20 adds macro urgency. ATR at 1.629 (1.22%) sets stop at 2.5x = ~4.07 below entry (~$130). Conviction is high: supply shock + technical breakout + live news flow. Size at 80%+ confidence tier (15% of equity).
